reference: Hello :) I have had what I thought was thrush since Christmas. I went to the doctor and was given two weeks of pediatric medicine for thrush and then some stronger pills. I am not sure if they were antibiotics, and it is still not cleared up. I typed in some of my symptoms and Candida came up, and I have almost all of the symptoms. :( I smoke marijuana most days. Do you think this is causing it?
text: Hello. I have had what I thought was thrush since Christmas. I went to the doctor and was given two weeks of pediatric medicine for thrush and then some stronger pills. I am not sure if they were antibiotics and it is still not cleared up. I typed in some of my symptoms and Candida came up and I have almost all of the symptoms. I smoke on them most days. Do you think this is causing it?
